candidates.why: Best direct top-line revenue label; appears to be the main reported revenue line in 2025/2023.
Also a direct revenue line and appears to be the main reported revenue label in earlier years.
Looks like a revenue total and numerically matches the main revenue line, but totals are less preferred than the underlying reported revenue label.

variables.notes: Used a priority list because the company appears to change its reported revenue label across years. Excluded 'Revenue from Business Activities - Total' because it is a total duplicate.

candidates.why: Best direct COGS/cost of sales line; preferred over identical total rows.
Numerically identical to Cost of Operating Revenue but is a total, so less preferred.
Could be useful analytically, but it is not the primary reported cost line across years.

variables.notes: Selected the direct reported cost line and avoided the duplicate total row.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D; per hierarchy this should be selected alone.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but should not be used when a populated explicit SG&A row exists.
Partial SG&A component only; less complete than the explicit SG&A row.
Too broad and includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

variables.notes: OK. CR:c|high|misclassified. Explicit populated SG&A row exists and is already stated net of R&D, so selected only that row.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not an R&D expense row; it indicates SG&A excluding R&D, so it does not map to XRD.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided income statement preview. Since selected SG&A already excludes R&D, XRD is left empty.

candidates.why: Best direct recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Also a valid direct interest expense line; appears numerically identical to Interest Expense in the preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense, so selecting it too would risk double counting.
Net finance total exists in preview but not in candidate list; granular interest rows are preferable anyway.

variables.notes: Selected the most direct recurring interest expense row and avoided double counting with lease-interest component or broader net finance totals.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes minority interest, which is required for BE.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity label and a good fallback if naming changes.
Appears equal to parent equity here and excludes minority interest in this statement structure; useful fallback.
Another likely equivalent common equity fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity lines so BE excludes minority interest. Did not use total shareholders' equity including minority interest.

candidates.why: Best direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line.
Also a direct minority interest label and a good fallback if label changes.
Income statement allocation line, but balance-sheet minority interest is preferred for MIB.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet minority interest labels as a priority list.
